indicators.Cotacao: Closing price of the stock in the last trading session.
indicators.Tipo: ON: Common shares, PN: Preferred shares, PNA: Preferred class A, etc.
indicators.DataUltCot: Date of the last trading session in which the asset was traded.
indicators.Min52Sem: Lowest stock price in the last 12 months.
indicators.Max52Sem: Highest stock price in the last 12 months.
indicators.VolMed2m: Average trading volume of the stock in the last 2 months (BRL).
indicators.ValorDeMercado: Market capitalization, calculated by multiplying the stock price by the total number of shares.
indicators.UltBalancoProcessado: Date of the latest financial statement available in the database. All indicators are calculated considering the last 12 months ending on this date.
indicators.ValorDaFirma: Enterprise Value, calculated as market capitalization plus net debt.
indicators.NumeroAcoes: Total number of shares, including all classes: common, preferred, etc.
indicators.PL: Price divided by earnings per share. Represents the number of years needed to recover the invested capital assuming constant profits.
indicators.PVP: Price divided by book value per share. Indicates how much the market pays over the company's equity.
indicators.VPA: Book value per share: shareholders' equity divided by the total number of shares.
indicators.PEBIT: Price divided by EBIT per share.
indicators.MargemBruta: Gross profit divided by net revenue.
indicators.PSR: Price Sales Ratio: price divided by net revenue per share.
indicators.PAtivos: Price divided by total assets per share.
indicators.MargemLiquida: Net profit divided by net revenue.
indicators.PCapitalGiro: Price divided by working capital per share.
indicators.PAtivoCircLiq: Price divided by net current assets per share.
indicators.DivYield: Dividend Yield: dividend paid per share divided by the stock price.
indicators.LiquidezCorrente: Current assets divided by current liabilities.
indicators.DividaBrutaPatrimonio: Total gross debt divided by shareholders' equity.
indicators.CrescimentoReceita5a: Net revenue growth over the last 5 years.
indicators.GiroAtivos: Net revenue divided by total assets.
indicators.Ativo: All assets, rights, and receivables owned by an entity.
indicators.DividaBruta: Sum of short-term and long-term debt and debentures.
indicators.DividaLiquida: Gross debt minus cash and equivalents.
indicators.AtivoCirculante: Assets or rights that can be converted into cash in the short term.
indicators.ReceitaLiquida: Total sales revenue minus returns, discounts, and taxes.
indicators.LucroLiquido: Final company profit after all expenses.
indicators.CNPJ: Brazilian National Registry of Legal Entities.
indicators.SetorDeAtuacao: Company's sector on the stock exchange.
indicators.DividendYield: Dividends per share divided by stock price.
indicators.Payout: Percentage of earnings distributed as dividends.
indicators.DividaLiquidaPatrimonio: Net debt divided by shareholders' equity.
indicators.CrescReceita5anos: Revenue growth over the last 5 years.
indicators.PAtivo: Price divided by total assets per share.
indicators.PEGRatio: P/E ratio divided by earnings growth rate.
indicators.AtivoTotal: Total assets owned by the company.
indicators.EnterpriseValue: Enterprise value: market cap + net debt.
indicators.LPATrailing: Earnings per share over the last 12 months.
indicators.LPAForward: Estimated earnings per share for the next 12 months.
indicators.PLForward: Price divided by estimated forward earnings per share.
indicators.CrescTrimestralLucro: Net income growth compared to the same quarter last year.
indicators.EnterpriseReceita: Enterprise Value divided by total revenue.
indicators.ValorPatrimonial: Shareholders' equity divided by total shares.
indicators.UltimoDividendo: Value of the last dividend paid per share.
indicators.DataUltimoDividendo: Payment date of the last dividend.
indicators.Beta: Measure of stock volatility relative to the market.
indicators.AcoesemFloat: Number of shares available for trading.
indicators.Insider: Percentage of shares held by insiders.
indicators.Institucional: Percentage of shares held by institutions.
indicators.LucroLiquidoCommon: Net income available to common shareholders.
indicators.NdeAnalistas: Number of analysts covering the stock.
indicators.ProximosResultados: Expected date of next earnings release.
indicators.Teleconferencia: Date of the earnings conference call.
indicators.EstimativaMedia: Mean EPS estimate for the next period.
indicators.EstimativaBaixaAlta: Range between lowest and highest analyst estimates.
indicators.ReceitaEstimadaMedia: Mean revenue estimate for the next period.
indicators.ExDividendo: Date from which the stock trades without dividend rights.
indicators.LucroBruto: Total revenue minus cost of goods sold.
indicators.EBITDA: Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization.
indicators.ReceitaTotal: Company's total revenue from sales and services.
indicators.CaixaporAcao: Total cash divided by number of shares.
indicators.ReceitaporAcao: Total revenue divided by number of shares.
indicators.FluxodeCaLivre: Operating cash flow minus capital expenditures.
indicators.MargemOperacional: Operating income divided by total revenue.
indicators.DividaPatrimonio: Total debt divided by shareholders' equity.
indicators.LiquidezImediata: Most liquid assets divided by current liabilities.
indicators.CrescimentoReceita: Revenue growth rate compared to the prior period.
indicators.CrescimentoLucro: Earnings growth rate compared to the prior period.
indicators.PassivoTotal: Total liabilities and debts of the company.
indicators.ResultadoOperacional: Result from the company's core operations.
indicators.Depreciacao: Reduction in asset value over time due to wear and tear.
indicators.FCO: Operating Cash Flow: cash generated by operations.
indicators.FCI: Investing Cash Flow: cash used in investments.
indicators.FCF: Financing Cash Flow: cash from borrowings and repayments.
indicators.Receita: Total revenue from sales and services.
indicators.Custo: Cost of goods or services sold.

tour.sidebarAcoesDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the wallet icon to access your investment portfolio.
tour.sidebarOrdensDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the receipt icon to manage your buy and sell orders.
tour.sidebarProventosDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the coins icon to track your dividends.
tour.sidebarImportacaoDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the import icon to upload B3 spreadsheets.
tour.sidebarExportacaoDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the chart icon to export reports.
tour.acoesDesc: This is your investment portfolio. Click an asset to view details like fundamental indicators and dividends.
tour.acoesTableDesc: Each row represents an asset in your portfolio. Click any asset to access the details page with complete information.
tour.acoesCompositionDesc: Pie chart showing your investment distribution. For viewing only — not interactive.
tour.acoesProfitabilityDesc: Profitability chart of your assets. For informative viewing only — not interactive.
tour.ordensDesc: Manage your buy and sell orders. Use filters to find specific orders and add new transactions.
tour.ordensFiltersDesc: Filter orders by code, operation (buy/sell), and date range. Use 'Filter' to apply and 'Clear' to reset.
tour.proventosDesc: Track your dividends, JCP and other earnings. Filter by type, date, or group by code for better visualization.
tour.importacaoDesc: Import trade and dividend data directly from Excel spreadsheets generated by B3. Select a file and click import.
tour.exportacaoDesc: Export your app data to PDF or Excel. Generate portfolio and sell order reports to share or archive.
tour.sidebarConfiguracoesDesc: This section is in the sidebar menu. Click the gear icon to access application settings.
tour.configuracoesDesc: Customize the app language and theme according to your preferences.
tour.personalizarDesc: Choose which modules appear on your main dashboard.
tour.personalizarModulesDesc: Enable or disable modules like Portfolio, Composition, and Profitability using the toggle switches.
tour.acaoDetailsDesc: View complete asset information including financial indicators, balance sheets, and statements.
tour.acaoDetailsCardsDesc: Browse through the cards to check fundamental indicators, price charts, and dividends for the asset.

acoes.title: My Portfolio
acoes.confirmDeleteMessage: Do you really want to delete the asset

orders.title: Orders
orders.confirmDeleteMessage: Do you really want to delete the order

proventos.title: Dividends
proventos.confirmDeleteMessage: Do you really want to delete the dividend

importacao.title: Spreadsheet Import
importacao.description: Upload Excel files (.xlsx/.xls) to import Trades and Dividends.
importacao.negociacaoHint: Expected headers: Trade Date, Movement Type, Market, Ticker, Quantity, Price, Value.
importacao.proventosHint: Expected headers: Product, Payment, Event Type, Institution, Quantity, Unit Price, Net Value.
importacao.portfolioHint: Expected headers: Code, Quantity, Average Price.

configuracoes.title: Settings
configuracoes.temaHint: Toggle between light and dark mode.

personalizar.title: Customize Dashboard
personalizar.description: Choose which modules to display on your main dashboard.
personalizar.moduleWalletDesc: Consolidated overview of your total assets and daily variation.
personalizar.moduleCompositionDesc: Breakdown by asset class, sectors, and geographic allocation.
personalizar.moduleProfitabilityDesc: Historical performance analysis compared to market benchmarks.

exportacao.title: Export
exportacao.description: Export the stocks page to PDF.
exportacao.acoesPdfHint: Generates a print of the stocks page to save as PDF.
exportacao.portfolioExcelHint: Exports current portfolio (positions and average price) to spreadsheet.
exportacao.orderSellPdfHint: Generates PDF with fields: Code, currentAveragePrice, Quantity, currentStockValue, gains and date.

fileInput.clickToUpload: Click the button below to upload
fileInput.invalidFileType: Invalid file type for this field
fileInput.couldNotIdentify: Could not identify the dragged file

cards.investidor10Revenue: Regions where the company generates revenue

historical.description: Table with the company's main financial indicators over the years
